features.name: enum_function_return_type_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a function returning an enum type that returns an integer literal value without enum compatibility check

features.name: enum_function_argument_type_mismatch
features.description: Code should include a function with an enum-typed parameter being called with an integer argument without enum compatibility check

features.name: enum_array_element_type_propagation
features.description: Code should include an enum-typed variable assigned from an array element of the same enum type, where type propagation through array indexing was failing
